imageSummary: [SUBJECT:PERSON_EMOTION] A close-up portrait of a handsome elegant man with messy purple hair and glowing purple eyes, wearing a dark purple vest and white shirt, a slim black cigarette held loosely between his thin lips, smirking seductively through wisps of smoke, cinematic indoor lighting, intimate mood.

text: 烟本官收下了。不过看归看，下午可别满脑子都是本官这副样子，连画笔都拿不稳了。
rawContent: 烟本官收下了。不过看归看，下午可别满脑子都是本官这副样子，连画笔都拿不稳了。

voiceText: 要是真被我迷得画不下去，随时欢迎你……过来找我兑现‘代价’。
